item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested N+1 field addition, explicitly names the repeated pattern across prior fixes, refuses making the warranty field the default permanent solution, and moves upstream to template/information architecture redesign with consolidation into a business terms confirmation structure.
